articles.title: Show HN: Axe – A 12MB binary that replaces your AI framework

That's expensive, slow, and fragile. Good software is small, focused, and composable... AI agents should be...

articles.title: Show HN: A context-aware permission guard for Claude Code

articles.title: Show HN: Context Gateway – Compress agent context before it hits the LLM
